name: Mascarpone Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup PLUS 1 tablespoon long-grain rice (do not use uncooked converted rice or instant rice)
1 vanilla bean, split lengthwise and seeds scraped into milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice, milk, and vanilla bean in a medium saucepan. Bring to a simmer.
2. Cook, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon until the milk has been absorbed, about 30 to 40 minutes.
3. Set aside 1 tablespoon of the half-and-half and stir the remaining cream into the rice mixture. Bring to a simmer and continue cooking until the rice is very tender, another 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. Set aside 1 teaspoon of the sugar and stir the remaining sugar into the rice mixture. Cover and allow to cool to lukewarm, about 45 minutes. Remove vanilla bean and stir in mascarpone cheese.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
6. While pudding is cooling, stir the reserved 1 tablespoon cream and 1 teaspoon sugar into the sliced almonds. Spread the almonds on a foil-lined pan and toast until they are lightly browned, about 15 minutes. Set aside to cool.
7. Serve rice pudding with a sprinkling of toasted almonds on top.
